residuals.risk: A reference BOM could become a de facto vendor or SKU requirement.
residuals.disposition: BOMs name capability roles and require at least two substitution classes without vendor fields.
residuals.stop_condition: A conforming build requires a named vendor, SKU or single source.

residuals.risk: A specified build could be presented as physically validated or field ready.
residuals.disposition: Every build is specified-only and explicitly rejects physical performance and field-readiness claims.
residuals.stop_condition: A specified manifest claims physical performance, certification or field readiness.

residuals.risk: Existing components could bypass OpenBREC contracts through ad hoc integration.
residuals.disposition: Reuse requires a versioned adapter, capability mapping, fallback, disable path and limitations.
residuals.stop_condition: A reused component lacks a closed adapter manifest.

residuals.risk: A reused adapter could write facts or export raw payload by default.
residuals.disposition: Adapters cannot write facts directly and raw payload defaults false.
residuals.stop_condition: An adapter writes facts or enables raw payload by default.

residuals.risk: Sharing enclosure or power could be mistaken for RF coexistence.
residuals.disposition: Plane separation stays normative and shared enclosure requires exact coexistence evidence.
residuals.stop_condition: A shared assembly claims coexistence without measurement.

residuals.risk: Transport products may contribute default identity, keys or acknowledgements as trust.
residuals.disposition: Adapters remain non-authoritative and application identity, signature and lifecycle stay above the bearer.
residuals.stop_condition: A transport ID, PSK or ACK becomes OpenBREC identity or acceptance.

residuals.risk: A sensor build could imply detection performance or presence inference.
residuals.disposition: Beacon build declares specified-only evidence, abstention and prohibited capabilities.
residuals.stop_condition: A build claims presence, absence, identity, diagnosis or measured range without evidence.

residuals.risk: The community needs a deterministic submission and review process for new builds and adapters.
residuals.disposition: OS-08 will publish the conformance kit, matrix and evidence-pack contribution workflow.
residuals.stop_condition: Final publication lacks submission, review and versioning rules.

residuals.risk: Adapter compatibility can drift as upstream firmware and schemas change.
residuals.disposition: OS-08 conformance vectors will require pinned versions and revalidation on change.
residuals.stop_condition: A promoted adapter lacks exact version and current vectors.

residuals.risk: Textual functional plans may not satisfy every fabrication or accessibility context.
residuals.disposition: OS-08 publication process will accept reviewed enclosure, schematic, localization and accessibility packs as optional profiles.
residuals.stop_condition: A contribution presents an optional fabrication pack as universal.

residuals.risk: Electrical, battery, fuel, enclosure and environmental safety depend on exact construction.
residuals.disposition: Require exact diagrams, ratings, inspection, competent review and measured evidence before physical claims.
residuals.stop_condition: A physical safety claim cites only this reference build.

residuals.risk: Range, airtime, near-far and co-site behavior are not established by functional plans.
residuals.disposition: Require exact radio, antenna, firmware, channel plan, load and repeated RF tests.
residuals.gate_or_task: optional P1a or field evidence pack
residuals.stop_condition: A radio performance claim lacks exact configuration evidence.
